title: Manage integrated crop and pasture production
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage integrated crop and pasture production demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Develop a pasture and crop program

pcs.text: Establish production targets for each crop and pasture type consistent with market and production constraints, and marketing and workplace objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish production targets for each crop and pasture type consistent with market and production constraints, and marketing and workplace objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish production targets for each crop and pasture type consistent with market and production constraints, and marketing and workplace objectives.

pcs.text: Select plant varieties that are best suited to soil, climate, seasonal conditions and marketing goals for crop or pasture
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select plant varieties that are best suited to soil, climate, seasonal conditions and marketing goals for crop or pasture?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select plant varieties that are best suited to soil, climate, seasonal conditions and marketing goals for crop or pasture.

pcs.text: Determine longer term trends in weed, pest and disease incidence and evaluate any necessary control measures, including integrated weed management strategies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine longer term trends in weed, pest and disease incidence and evaluate any necessary control measures, including integrated weed management strategies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine longer term trends in weed, pest and disease incidence and evaluate any necessary control measures, including integrated weed management strategies.

pcs.text: Assess soil moisture, rainfall patterns, decile probability, evaporation, wind and moisture requirements for growth
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess soil moisture, rainfall patterns, decile probability, evaporation, wind and moisture requirements for growth?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess soil moisture, rainfall patterns, decile probability, evaporation, wind and moisture requirements for growth.

pcs.text: Assess nutrient requirements for crops and pastures to determine appropriate fertiliser programs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess nutrient requirements for crops and pastures to determine appropriate fertiliser programs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess nutrient requirements for crops and pastures to determine appropriate fertiliser programs.

pcs.text: Assess technology to ensure efficient performance of operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess technology to ensure efficient performance of operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess technology to ensure efficient performance of operations.

pcs.text: Identify and maintain budgetary constraints
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and maintain budgetary constraints?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and maintain budgetary constraints.

pcs.text: Develop a pasture and crop program to meet production targets and workplace objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop a pasture and crop program to meet production targets and workplace objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a pasture and crop program to meet production targets and workplace objectives.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety hazards in crop and pasture management, and develop control strategies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health and safety hazards in crop and pasture management, and develop control strategies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards in crop and pasture management, and develop control strategies.

elements.title: Implement pasture and crop management program

pcs.text: Implement and monitor pasture and crop program to ensure capacity and development is as planned

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement and monitor pasture and crop program to ensure capacity and development is as planned.

pcs.text: Implement planned weed, pest and disease control

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement planned weed, pest and disease control.

pcs.text: Determine and conduct fertiliser and pesticide applications and rates appropriate to crop or pasture type

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and conduct fertiliser and pesticide applications and rates appropriate to crop or pasture type.

pcs.text: Apply crop and pasture nutrient requirements to ensure achievement of yield and sustainability of pasture
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply crop and pasture nutrient requirements to ensure achievement of yield and sustainability of pasture?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply crop and pasture nutrient requirements to ensure achievement of yield and sustainability of pasture.

pcs.text: Evaluate in-season soil moisture and review crop and pasture production potential
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate in-season soil moisture and review crop and pasture production potential?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate in-season soil moisture and review crop and pasture production potential.

pcs.text: Determine and implement processes to minimise waste and soil degradation, and meet environmental and sustainability standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and implement processes to minimise waste and soil degradation, and meet environmental and sustainability standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and implement processes to minimise waste and soil degradation, and meet environmental and sustainability standards.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor crop and pasture maturity and conduct harvesting to maximise quality and volume of harvesting efficiency.

pcs.text: Determine if cultural practices, grazing management are conducive to production requirements and implement changes to practices where necessary

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine if cultural practices, grazing management are conducive to production requirements and implement changes to practices where necessary.
